title: stelis conchipetala
intro: Stelis conchipetala, also known as the Antillean Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis conchipetala include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Stelis conchipetala can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, which is a common herbal preparation method.
